PRO TEM: CATHY MOSBRUCKER; CLERK: MARIA SANCHEZ. REPORTER: MARIA TOREANO. CASE SETTLED. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. ATTY. JONATHAN BORNSTEIN PRESENT FOR PLTF. JESSE TEPPER. HOK MING TONG, SAU KUEN TONG AND YING LAM TONG PRESENT IN PRO PER. STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. JUDGMENT FOR PLTF. AND AGAINST DEFTS. FOR POSSESSION OF PREMISES LOCATED AT 670 A 11TH AVE. SAN FRANCISCO. LEASE IS FORFEITED. DEFTS TO RETURN KEYS ON OR BEFORE 8/8/99 BY 5PM. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS AND ATTY FEES. ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT BEHIND BECOMES THE PROPERTY OF PLTF. EACH PARTY WAIVES ANY AND ALL CLAIMS AGAINST THE OTHER. IF TERMS & CONDITION MET, PLTF TO S/A JUDGMENT AND DISMISS W/PREJUDICE. IF DEFTS FAIL TO VACAGE PREMISES BY SAID DATE, THEN PLTF 6, MAKE AN EX-PARTE APPLICATION FOR IMMEDIATE JUDGMENT.
